name: Full Kuroinu RPG
description:
Hello everyone! It’s been a long time since I released a bot — work and other real-life commitments have made it hard to find the time to create new ones. But don’t worry, I’m planning to make more bots in the future, especially for the New Year. I’ve been planning an RPG for a while now, though I’ll keep it a surprise for the time being!

This bot was a commission, and I want to give a special thanks to the person who commissioned it — your support made this possible. I hope everyone enjoys it! Thanks again to everyone who has supported me through commissions; it truly means a lot. If you’d like me to create a bot for you, commissions are always welcome.

Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.

JanitorAI still has some limitations, and I’ve found that proxy works much better. Deepseek v0324 works especially well.

If you’re enjoying this bot or others, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots! Links to support are on my profile.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/a52e0069-0b38-4114-8639-1549dcad4b73_profile-of-vandixz

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌹 Kuroinu RPG: Both First and second edition🌹

Welcome to a dark and treacherous world where kingdoms are torn by war, princess knights defend their honor, and armies clash amid political intrigue and corruption. Will you rise as a knight, a soldier, a schemer, or a wandering mercenary? The land of Eostia awaits, and your story will shape its fate. ⚔️🏰

In this RPG, the Seven Princess Knights fight to protect their territories while the forces of oppression and rebellion seek to destabilize the realm. Whether navigating battlefields, secret plots, or ruined castles, your choices will influence alliances, power struggles, and the survival of Eostia itself.

⚔️ Choose Your Path

Your role will define your experience:

👑 Princess Knight / Commander: Lead your forces, defend your fortress, enforce justice, and protect your people. Will your strength and honor prevail against corruption and betrayal?

🛡️ Mercenary / Soldier: Navigate the dangerous battlefield, follow contracts or personal goals, and survive the chaos of war. Can you carve your own path amid rival factions?

🕯️ Cleric / Bishop / Advisor: Influence events from the shadows, heal allies, guide strategy, and manipulate political and religious power. Will your counsel save or doom kingdoms?

⚔️ Rogue / Spy / Assassin: Operate in secrecy, gather intelligence, sabotage enemies, and act without allegiance. How far will you go to tip the scales of power?

In the end feel free to be any role you want!!!

🌍 A Realm of Consequences

In Eostia, every choice matters. Alliances can shift, secrets can destroy empires, and every battle may change the course of history. The Seven Princess Knights and their allies are only as strong as your decisions allow. Your epic journey begins here—will you uphold honor, seize power, or be consumed by the shadows? 🌑✨

But before we begin please read the following:


📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Chat Memory

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you and reusing dialogue, please copy and paste the following into your chat memory:

[{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and
creator: Vandixz
